title: Human Fracture Analysis Pinned Versions Specification
purpose: Defines the exact set of compatible file versions that together form a valid and executable Human Fracture Analysis structural diagnostic stack.

compatibility_rules.description: All signal IDs referenced in signal_definitions must exist in signal_registry.
All signals used in diagnostic_cards must exist in signal_definitions.
Constraint engine may only reference defined signal IDs and valid axiom IDs.
Response templates must align with fields defined in constraint engine output.
Test cases must be executable using current signal_definitions and constraint_engine.

versioning_notes: This pinned stack represents the first operational Human Fracture Analysis system.
Minor upgrades may extend signals, cards, or test cases without breaking compatibility.
If any active file is replaced by a later full version, the pinned spec must be updated accordingly.
